tweets.text: With ISIS defeated in their ancestral homelands, displaced Yezidi families are returning to rebuild their lives. @StateDeptPM assistance is empowering Yezidis who survived ISIS to play a critical role in ridding Sinjar of dangerous explosive hazards. https://t.co/ATlfEL0j5I #Iraq

.@SecPompeo with @Kilmeade: [#Iran’s regime] is the world’s largest state sponsor of terror and they are squandering the people’s money, the Iranian people’s money, on these silly malign activities. And our effort is to get them to change that behavior. https://t.co/Jm0EzaIIYW

.@SecPompeo: Over decades, the #Iran regime has sown a great deal of destruction and instability. The pressure will only increase if Iran does not live up to the standards the U.S. and its partners and allies—and the Iranian people themselves—want to see. https://t.co/x8UW2y6epf

There are 5 days until the #Iran sanctions deadline, so here’s a reminder for the regime about the 5th requirement to behave like a normal state: The Iranian regime must end its military support for the Houthi militia and work towards a peaceful political settlement in Yemen. https://t.co/kyBjtjhTRI

Initiatives include: providing early warnings of foreign disinformation; analyzing foreign audiences most susceptible to disinformation; developing partnerships with local influencers; and building skills of civil society, influencers, and journalists to address disinformation.

Deputy @statedeptspox Robert Palladino: @StateDept’s Global Engagement Center has obligated $40 million to support initiatives that counter disinformation spread by foreign countries abroad, including #Russia, #Iran, and #China.

With 6 days to go before the sanctions deadline, this is the 6th requirement for #Iran’s regime to behave like a normal state: The Iranian regime must respect the sovereignty of the Iraqi government and permit the disarming, demobilization, and reintegration of Shia militias. https://t.co/IRsZR90KmN

.@POTUS: As mark of solemn respect for victims of the terrible act of violence perpetrated at The Tree of Life Synagogue in Pittsburgh, I order that the flag of the U.S. shall be flown at half-staff at @WhiteHouse and upon all public buildings and grounds. https://t.co/syGm62CWNv

7 days from today, sanctions will be reimposed on #Iran’s regime. Here’s a reminder about the 7th requirement for the regime to behave like a normal state: it must end support to Middle East terrorist groups, including Lebanese Hizballah, Hamas, and the Palestine Islamic Jihad. https://t.co/CJpl7nqHQ2

The November 4 #Iran sanctions deadline is 9 days away. Here's a reminder of the 9th requirement for the regime: the Iranian regime must end its proliferation of ballistic missiles and half further launching or development of nuclear-capable missile systems. https://t.co/nV9Oe7zxMc

This Week at State: @SecPompeo addresses the migrant caravan, counting down to the Nov. 4 #Iran sanctions deadline, speaking to @WhiteHouse Fellows, @POTUS remembers victims of the 1983 Beirut terrorist attack, new @FSIatState director, and more: https://t.co/ThTvXcxnAj https://t.co/N0gb8mlPfe

Amb. Smith: As the 21st Director of @FSIatState, I want to make @FSIatState even stronger -- that means delivering the best possible training to all @StateDept employees, whether Foreign Service, Civil Service, Locally Employed Staff, or non-career, & employees of other agencies. https://t.co/aUiPppNB87

.@SecPompeo on the 20th Anniversary of the International #ReligiousFreedom Act: The protection of religious freedom is central to the @POTUS administration’s foreign policy, and protecting this human right is an essential part of who we are as Americans. https://t.co/HX8u9j4lfY

There are 10 days left before the Nov. 4 sanctions deadline, so here’s a reminder about the 10th requirement for the Islamic Republic of #Iran to behave like a normal state: The Iranian regime must provide @iaeaorg with unqualified access to all sites throughout the country. https://t.co/RPmlVwSfSm

Deputy Secretary John Sullivan will deliver remarks and officiate the swearing-in ceremony for Ambassador Daniel Smith as Director of @FSIatState at 1:00 p.m. ET on Friday, October 26. https://t.co/D8bSzyEV9M

With 11 days left until the Nov. 4 sanctions deadline, here’s a reminder about the 11th requirement for the regime in #Iran to behave like a normal state: The regime must stop enrichment and never pursue plutonium reprocessing. This includes closing its heavy water reactor. https://t.co/qvXyzduDrq

.@SecPompeo outlined 12 requirements for #Iran's regime to act like a normal state. With 12 days to go before the Nov. 4 sanctions deadline, here’s a daily reminder for the regime, starting with #12: Declare prior military dimensions of your nuclear program & abandon such work. https://t.co/J3kx947rE9

@USUN Ambassador Nikki Haley: #Iran’s economy is increasingly devoted to funding Iranian repression and aggression abroad. In this case, Iranian big business and finance are funding the war crime of using child soldiers. This is crony terrorism. https://t.co/KGxP8hQ59w

.@USUN Ambassador Nikki Haley: #Iran’s Basij Resistance Force indoctrinates school children and provides combat training to children as young as 12 years old. These children are then coerced into fighting abroad for the Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC). https://t.co/93h9EMxVrS
.@USUN Ambassador Nikki Haley: The use of child soldiers is a moral outrage that every civilized nation rejects, but #Iran celebrates. https://t.co/mySzXH0B6W

Today, @SecPompeo met with Saudi Arabia's King Salman to discuss regional and bilateral issues. He also thanked the King for his commitment to supporting a thorough, transparent, and timely investigation of Jamal Khashoggi's disappearance. Read more: https://t.co/dcSuYUgw9H https://t.co/PjbN5KQ0eP
